items.name: Evolo 24K Gold Espresso
items.description: Double shot of single-origin Ethiopian beans infused with edible 24k gold flakes. Served in a chilled crystal glass.

items.name: Smoked Oak Oak-Milk Latte
items.description: Slow-dripped espresso with custom-toasted organic oat milk, cold-smoked with real white oak chips.

items.name: Kyoto Cold Drip
items.description: 24-hour slow drip extraction through clean volcanic sand filtration. Notes of dark chocolate and stone fruit.

items.name: Truffle Crème Cappuccino
items.description: Traditional cappuccino topped with a rich foam containing micro-shaved black winter truffle dust.

items.name: Imperial Uji Matcha Ceremony
items.description: Uji ceremonial grade matcha hand-whisked to perfection. Served with organic sweet bean paste.

items.name: Silver Needle White Tea
items.description: Delicate, hand-harvested young buds from Fuding. Light honey aroma with a smooth, lingering finish.

items.name: Crimson Hibiscus Rose Infusion
items.description: Organic Egyptian hibiscus petals steep-infused with damask rosewater and raw wild clover honey.

items.name: Madagascar Vanilla Bean Caviar Soufflé
items.description: Light, warm-rising soufflé filled with aromatic vanilla caviar and warm gold-foil caramel sauce.

items.name: Matcha Pistachio Opera Cake
items.description: Layered sponge cake with premium matcha buttercream, pistachio praline, and dark chocolate ganache.

items.name: Deconstructed Citrus Tart
items.description: Meyer lemon curd, blood orange gel, toasted Italian meringue peaks, served over buttery speculoos soil.

items.name: Sparkling Saffron & Pear
items.description: Clarified pear nectar, premium Iranian saffron syrup, sparkling tonic water, finished with a fresh rosemary sprig.

items.name: Smoked Rosemary Blackberry Sour
items.description: Muddled wild blackberries, fresh lemon juice, sparkling water, served with a smoking rosemary branch.

items.name: Truffle & Parmesan Pomme Frites
items.description: Hand-cut triple-cooked potatoes tossed in pure white truffle oil and aged Parmigiano-Reggiano flakes.

items.name: Avocado & Gold Foil Crostini
items.description: Artisanal sourdough, whipped hass avocado, cold-pressed olive oil, heirloom micro-greens, and micro gold leaf.
